textPlain: Hah, funny to see this reposted – I'm the author.We've had great success with Replicache+Orama since this was written. We're keen to give Zero a spin once it's a bit more stable.Triplit has essentially folded as a "company" and become some sort of open-source initiative instead.InstantDB has matured massively and is definitely worth a look for anyone starting a new project.
